sentences.target: Der Lehrling bringt Kaffee für alle.

translations.de: Der Lehrling bringt Kaffee für alle.
translations.en: The apprentice brings coffee for everyone.
translations.es: El aprendiz trae café para todos.
translations.fr: L’apprenti apporte du café pour tout le monde.
translations.it: L’apprendista porta il caffè per tutti.
translations.pt: O aprendiz traz café para todos.
translations.vi: Người học việc mang cà phê cho mọi người.
translations.nl: De leerling brengt koffie voor iedereen.
translations.hi: प्रशिक्षु सबके लिए कॉफी लाता है.
translations.el: Ο εκπαιδευόμενος φέρνει καφέ για όλους.
translations.nb: Lærlingen kommer med kaffe til alle.
translations.id: Anak magang membawakan kopi untuk semua orang.
translations.sv: Lärlingen tar med kaffe till alla.
translations.ro: Ucenicul aduce cafea pentru toată lumea.
translations.da: Lærlingen kommer med kaffe til alle.
translations.ja: 見習いがみんなにコーヒーを持ってくる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; determines the subject noun 'Lehrling'.
Common noun; masculine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; 3rd person singular, present indicative; transitive, taking the accusative object 'Kaffee' and a prepositional phrase with 'für'.
Common noun; masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'bringt' (a mass noun here).
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces a benefactive phrase.
Indefinite pronoun; accusative plural; object of the preposition 'für' (no following noun).

sentences.target: Ich war mal Lehrling in der Bäckerei.
sentences.reading: /ɪç vaːʁ maːl ˈleːɐ̯lɪŋ ɪn deːɐ̯ bɛkəˈʁaɪ̯/

translations.de: Ich war mal Lehrling in der Bäckerei.
translations.ipa: /ɪç vaːʁ maːl ˈleːɐ̯lɪŋ ɪn deːɐ̯ bɛkəˈʁaɪ̯/
translations.en: I was an apprentice at the bakery.
translations.it: Sono stato apprendista in una panetteria.
translations.zh-Hans: 我以前在一家面包店当学徒。
translations.yue: 我以前喺麵包店做學徒。
translations.ru: Я раньше был учеником в пекарне.
translations.vi: Trước đây tôi từng học việc ở tiệm bánh.
translations.nl: Ik was ooit leerling bij de bakker.
translations.uk: Я колись був учнем у пекарні.
translations.hi: मैं पहले बेकरी में प्रशिक्षु था.
translations.nb: Jeg var en gang lærling i et bakeri.
translations.id: Dulu saya pernah magang di sebuah toko roti.
translations.sv: Jag var en gång lärling på ett bageri.
translations.ro: Am fost cândva ucenic la o brutărie.
translations.cs: Kdysi jsem byl učněm v pekárně.
translations.da: Jeg var engang lærling i et bageri.
translations.ja: 昔、パン屋で見習いをしていました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary; simple past (preterite), 1st person singular indicative; links the subject to the predicate noun 'Lehrling'.
Temporal adverb (colloquial) meaning 'at one time/once'; modifies 'war'.
Common noun; masculine nominative singular; predicate nominative (predicative complement) with 'sein'.
Preposition governing the dative for static location; introduces the PP 'in der Bäckerei'.
Definite article; feminine dative singular; determines 'Bäckerei' after 'in' (location).
Common noun; feminine dative singular; object of the preposition 'in' (place).

sentences.target: Mein Bruder ist Lehrling beim Elektriker.

translations.de: Mein Bruder ist Lehrling beim Elektriker.
translations.en: My brother is an apprentice with the electrician.
translations.es: Mi hermano trabaja como aprendiz con un electricista.
translations.fr: Mon frère est apprenti chez un électricien.
translations.it: Mio fratello è apprendista da un elettricista.
translations.ko: 제 남동생은 전기기사 밑에서 견습으로 일해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我弟弟在电工那里当学徒。
translations.yue: 我細佬喺電工嗰度做學徒。
translations.ru: Мой брат работает учеником у электрика.
translations.pt: Meu irmão trabalha como aprendiz com um eletricista.
translations.vi: Em trai tôi đang học việc với một thợ điện.
translations.nl: Mijn broer is leerling bij een elektricien.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई एक इलेक्ट्रीशियन के साथ काम सीख रहा है.
translations.pl: Mój brat jest uczniem u elektryka.
translations.el: Ο αδελφός μου είναι μαθητευόμενος σε έναν ηλεκτρολόγο.
translations.nb: Broren min er lærling hos en elektriker.
translations.id: Saudara laki-laki saya magang dengan seorang tukang listrik.
translations.sv: Min bror är lärling hos en elektriker.
translations.ro: Fratele meu este ucenic la un electrician.
translations.cs: Můj bratr je učněm u elektrikáře.
translations.da: Min bror er lærling hos en elektriker.
translations.ja: 弟は電気工のもとで見習いをしています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; nominative masculine singular; agrees with 'Bruder'.
Common noun; masculine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary; present, 3rd person singular indicative; links the subject to the predicate noun 'Lehrling' and the following PP.
Common noun; masculine nominative singular; predicate nominative with 'sein'.
Preposition in fused form (contraction of 'bei dem'); governs the dative; introduces a location at a person/business.
Common noun; masculine dative singular; object of the preposition 'beim' (= bei + dem).

translations.en: Our company is looking for an apprentice.
translations.it: La nostra azienda cerca un apprendista.
translations.vi: Công ty chúng tôi đang tuyển học việc.
translations.hi: हमारी कंपनी एक प्रशिक्षु की तलाश में है.
translations.el: Η εταιρεία μας ψάχνει για μαθητευόμενο.
translations.id: Perusahaan kami sedang mencari anak magang.
translations.ja: うちの会社は見習いを募集しています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; nominative feminine singular; agrees with 'Firma'.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; 3rd person singular, present indicative; transitive, selecting an accusative object.
Indefinite article; masculine accusative singular; determines 'Lehrling' as an indefinite object.
Common noun; masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'sucht'.
